data.title: Memecoins Account for Half of New Listings in February, Exchange Data Show
data.description:
The post Memecoins Account for Half of New Listings in February, Exchange Data Show appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Cryptocurrency exchange MEXC has released a report on new listings for January and February 2025, revealing that almost 50% of all tokens listed were memecoins. Despite the market volatility, interest in tokens associated with popular personalities and social trends...
source: https://coinpedia.org/information/memecoins-account-for-half-of-new-listings-in-february-exchange-data-show/

data.title: Senate Banking Committee votes to advance stablecoin bill, collecting support from both Democrats and Republicans
data.description:
The Senate Banking Committee voted to advance a monumental stablecoin bill, advancing it to the full Senate.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/346143/senate-banking-committee-votes-to-advance-stablecoin-bill-collecting-support-from-both-democrats-and-republicans?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Arkham: US Government Flags Address to Transfer $5,500 Worth of AVAX Tokens to New Wallet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arkham posted on the X platform that the US government marked the address and just transferred funds, transferring $5,500 worth of AVAX tokens to a new wallet.

data.title: U.S. Government Transfers AVAX Tokens to New Wallet
data.description: According to Odaily, Arkham reported on the X platform that the U.S. government has recently moved funds, transferring AVAX tokens valued at $5,500 to a new wallet.

data.title: Telegram Wallet Launches Multi-Asset Trading and Earn Options
data.description:
Telegram Wallet is making a number of latest updates to its crypto wallet, introducing multi-asset trading and permanent earn options. 
The post Telegram Wallet Launches Multi-Asset Trading and Earn Options appeared first on Cryptonews.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/ton-wallet-in-telegram-launches-multi-asset-trading-and-earn-options/

data.title: Blockchain in Healthcare: Revolutionizing Data Management and Patient Care
data.description:
Imagine having instant, secure access to your medical records, fully under your control—yet today’s healthcare system falls short. Patient data is often fragmented across disconnected systems, leading to inefficiencies, errors, and privacy concerns. Data breaches are common, and sharing information between providers remains a challenge, delaying care. Blockchain in healthcare offers a...
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/03/13/blockchain-in-healthcare-revolutionizing-data-management-and-patient-care/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=blockchain-in-healthcare-revolutionizing-data-management-and-patient-care

data.title: Aptos Crypto May Push Lower, Negative Funding Rates Spike
data.description:
The Aptos crypto community has been taking note as price pushed to significant historic level. However, while expectations are bullish, recent data signals the possibility that APT could continue to seek more downside. Aptos crypto hovered near the $5.1 price level at the time of writing. It has historically bounced off the same level multiple […]
The post Aptos Crypto May Push Lower, Negative...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/13/aptos-crypto-may-push-lower-negative-funding-rates-spike/

data.title: Russia’s Ministry of Finance Plans to Regulate Crypto Operations with National Infrastructure
data.description:
Russia's Ministry of Finance is set to legalize cryptocurrency through a controlled national framework, utilizing an experimental legal system to monitor and regulate its adoption, with the goal of creating a safer and more effective crypto environment.
The post Russia’s Ministry of Finance Plans to Regulate Crypto Operations with National Infrastructure appeared first on Cryptonews.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/russia-finance-ministry-crypto-market-proposal/

data.title: JPMorgan upgrades Bitcoin miner, expects a 70% rally
data.description:
For the fourth quarter of 2024, JPMorgan (JPM) changed its Bitcoin miner price goals and estimates to take into account changes in the Bitcoin price and the network hashrate. The bank lowered its price target but the new prediction still shows that the price will go up 70%. Iren is JPM’s top pick in the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jpmorgan-upgrades-bitcoin-miner-a-70-rally/

data.title: CZ: Bloomberg’s report is false, Binance did not purchase WLFI tokens and has no business dealings with WLFI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance co-founder CZ posted on the X platform that Bloomberg published an unfounded and offensive article, and basically the entire article was purely fictitious. He/Binance had no business dealings with WLFI or the people mentioned in the article, nor did he purchase WLFI tokens.
